primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=28 is a nuclear magic number (proton shell closure) coprime to 3 (28 mod 3 = 1); all 13 routes are pure Cosmos. Witnesses that nuclear shell closure does not by itself grant Satellite access.
